docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST TO WAIVE FEES WERE DENIED AND PAYMENT OF COURT CLAIM FEE IS DELINQUENT. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
ORDER RE: DISMISSED W/O PREJUDICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,554.00 FILED BY TELFOR, DOMNIC AS TO DEFENDANT JORGE, VILLA OCHEAU, MARCOS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-26-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO PLAINTIFF TELFOR, DOMNIC
REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TELFOR, DOMNIC
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 7/29/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
